race.comment: Sticking with the McEvoy newcomer theme with UNSTIRRED (12), a gelding by Exceed And Excel. He draws for a lovely run and strikes a very winnable maiden here against a few exposed types. He's jumped out well and looks the one to beat. AQUA STORM (1) has been thereabouts in two runs back, perhaps not seeing out 1425m on heavy ground at Geelong. The fresh run says he'll take beating. CHARLOTTE'S WEB (8) similarly can improve on firmer footing third up having run well on debut at Werribee while BLAZING BROOK (7) has bolted in with a jumpout on synthetic recently and might be a sneaky improver, albeit she will need to find something.
